COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-10-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Joe Carciono, Jr., Esq. for the Plaintiffs: Francisco Amigo and Nelida Amigo, not present.
Guillermo L. Amigo present on behalf of his father Francisco Amigo.
Amy Carlson, Esq. for and with the Defendant: Elizabeth Sanchez.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Total settlement in the amount of $30,000.00, with a first payment of $10,000.00 to be made on or before 05-20-12, the remaining balance to be made in 15 equal installments of $1,333.33 starting on the 25th of each month until paid in full. Payment by check to be sent by certified mail to counsel's office at P.O. Box 3389, Redwood City, CA. 94063.
Parties agreed to terms on the record and the Court set the matter on the CRC Dismissal calendar on 07-20-12 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 610 for compliance to the terms of the settlement agreement. Counsel will submit to Dept. 610 a case management statement regarding the payments and request for a continuance on the CRC dismissal calendar for an additional 15 months.
